title: lithocarpus rigidus
intro: Lithocarpus rigidus, also known as the rigid corkbark or California nutmeg, is a species of evergreen tree that is native to the Pacific coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat respiratory issues, fever, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lithocarpus rigidus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. Lithocarpus rigidus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
